sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Halozyme Therapeutics (BIT:1HALO) Price Target Increased by 14.97% to 68.41
feed.summary: The average one-year price target for Halozyme Therapeutics (BIT:1HALO) has been raised by 14.97% to €68.41 per share from €59.51, reflecting an average across various analyst estimates. This new target indicates a 9.11% increase from the last closing price of €62.70. Institutional ownership data shows 1,154 funds holding positions, with some major shifts in their allocations over the past quarter.

feed.title: Oak Valley Community Bank Welcomes Carlos Chavez as Vice President, Branch Manager of Stockton Branch
feed.summary: Oak Valley Community Bank has appointed Carlos Chavez as Vice President, Branch Manager of its Stockton branch. Chavez brings over 21 years of banking experience and a strong background in operational leadership and client relationship building. He is a long-time Stockton resident with deep community ties, which aligns with Oak Valley's focus on local engagement.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Holmes John McClain III Sells 30,000 Shares of AAR Corp (AIR)
feed.summary: Holmes John McClain III, Chairman, President & CEO of AAR Corp (AIR), sold 30,000 shares of the company on January 12, 2026. This transaction is part of a trend over the past year where the insider has sold 163,090 shares with no purchases. AAR Corp's stock, trading at $97.5 per share, is considered modestly overvalued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Aerovironment CFO sells shares worth $367k By Investing.com
feed.summary: Aerovironment CFO Kevin Patrick McDonnell sold 999 shares of the company’s common stock on January 12, 2026, for a total of $367,232. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged trading plan. In other news, AeroVironment recently launched a new underwater drone, partnered for a U.S. Army drone program, and secured a new facility lease, while analysts have reiterated positive ratings for the company.

feed.title: Travere Therapeutics FDA Review Extension for FILSPARI
feed.summary: Travere Therapeutics announced that the FDA has extended the review timeline for FILSPARI's Supplemental New Drug Application (sNDA) for Focal Segmental Glomerulosclerosis (FSGS). The new action date is April 13, 2026, with the extension attributed to the submission of additional clinical benefit data for the drug. FILSPARI could become the first approved treatment for FSGS if it receives approval.

feed.title: Telephone & Data Systems completes $1.02 billion spectrum sale, Array declares special dividend
feed.summary: Telephone & Data Systems (TDS) announced its subsidiary, Array Digital Infrastructure, completed a $1.018 billion sale of spectrum assets to AT&T. This sale enhances TDS's liquidity, leading Array to declare a special cash dividend of $10.25 per share for its shareholders, payable on February 2, 2026, to record holders as of January 23, 2026. TDS's financial standing remains strong, with a current ratio of 1.89, and it recently amended its credit agreement, extending the maturity date of its credit facility.

feed.title: MP Materials Stock Expands with Strategic Partnership and Market Shifts
feed.summary: MP Materials Corp.'s stock is trading up by 5.89% due to positive sentiment and strategic growth prospects, including an Outperform rating from William Blair citing its "mine-to-magnet" status and strategic alliances. Despite negative profitability and a lowered price target from Deutsche Bank, the company is poised for future growth, supported by government efforts to secure critical minerals and its strong financial footing with low debt and significant cash reserves. The article highlights the strategic value of minerals and MP's potential for growth amid global market vulnerabilities.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share at $311 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a ten percent owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL), recently purchased 1 share of common stock for $311.84. This transaction, occurring on January 12, 2026, increased Horizon Kinetics' direct ownership to 3,487,690 shares, following a three-for-one stock split effective December 22, 2025. Texas Pacific Land also recently reported Q3 2025 earnings below expectations and announced a strategic partnership with Bolt Data & Energy and a three-for-one stock split.

feed.title: 667 months in a row: Realty Income keeps its $0.27 per share payout
feed.summary: Realty Income (NYSE: O) announced its 667th consecutive common stock monthly dividend of $0.2700 per share, payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 30, 2026. This annualized dividend amounts to $3.240 per share. The company, known as "The Monthly Dividend Company," has a portfolio of over 15,500 properties and has been an S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrat for over 30 years.

feed.title: Burford Capital prices $500 million senior notes at 8.5% yield By Investing.com
feed.summary: Burford Capital Limited announced the pricing of a $500 million private offering of senior notes due 2034 with an 8.5% interest rate, upsized from its initial amount. The company plans to use the proceeds to redeem its 5.000% bonds due 2026 and for general corporate purposes. This debt issuance follows a significant stock decline for Burford Capital, which specializes in litigation finance and asset management.

feed.title: BigBear.ai Faces Downgrade Amidst Revenue Decline Concerns
feed.summary: BigBear.ai Inc. has experienced a stock downgrade from "Overweight" to "Neutral" and a reduced price target of $6, largely due to a 20% year-over-year revenue decline stemming from volatile government contracts and poor operating margins. Investor concerns are further amplified by an investigation into potential securities fraud initiated by Pomerantz Law Firm. The company's financial challenges suggest a need for significant strategic recalibration to stabilize its market position.

feed.title: Caterpillar names Rod Shurman to lead construction industries division By Investing.com
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) announced that Rod Shurman will succeed Tony Fassino as group president of Construction Industries, effective February 1, 2026. Fassino will retire on May 31, 2026, after 30 years with the company. The transition comes as Caterpillar's stock trades near its 52-week high, with significant recent advancements in AI and strategic leadership changes, including CEO Joseph E. Creed becoming Chairman in April 2026.

feed.title: adp declares quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share, payable on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 13, 2026. This dividend reflects a 2.65% yield and 21.43% growth over the past year, continuing ADP's 52-year streak of dividend payments and 27 consecutive years of increases. The announcement follows recent positive U.S. private sector employment figures reported by ADP, despite a recent stock downgrade by Jefferies due to market saturation concerns.

feed.title: Disney unifies marketing teams to better connect with audiences worldwide
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Company has established a new enterprise marketing and brand organization to unify its marketing teams across all businesses and strengthen its connection with global consumers. Asad Ayaz has been appointed as the Chief Marketing and Brand Officer to lead this initiative, reporting directly to CEO Bob Iger and segment chairs. This strategic move aims to enhance brand consistency, leverage collective marketing strength, and streamline audience engagement across Disney's diverse portfolio.

feed.title: Automatic Data Processing Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.70 per Share, Payable April 1 to Holders of Record March 13
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.70 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on April 1 to shareholders who are on record as of March 13. The announcement was made by MT Newswires.

feed.title: Ford executives hit back at Cadillac’s F1 jabs: ‘They’re not running a Cadillac engine’
feed.summary: Ford executives, including Chairman Bill Ford and General Manager Will Ford, have strongly refuted Cadillac F1 CEO Dan Towriss's claims that Ford's partnership with Red Bull in Formula One is merely a "marketing deal." They argue that Cadillac F1's involvement, which uses a Ferrari engine and lacks significant GM embedded engineering, appears more like a marketing effort. Ford emphasizes its deep technical collaboration with Red Bull Powertrains, showcasing extensive engineering contributions and the intent to create the best power unit in F1.

feed.title: Why Everest is turning to a veteran HR leader to steer its global workforce
feed.summary: Everest Group, a global underwriting leader, has appointed Christopher Kujawa as Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer, effective January 20, 2026. Kujawa brings over 25 years of global HR leadership experience from companies like Conduent Inc., American Express, and Ally Financial. He will report to President and CEO Jim Williamson and will focus on elevating leadership, talent, and organizational performance to support Everest's goals of sustained profitability and value creation.

feed.title: NNN REIT, Inc. Announces 2025 Dividend Tax Status
feed.summary: NNN REIT, Inc. announced the tax status of its 2025 dividends, classifying 95.3188% of dividends paid to common shareholders as a taxable distribution for federal income tax purposes. The company highlighted that its $2.36 per share common dividend in 2025 marked the 36th consecutive annual increase, attributing this to its disciplined investment strategy and diversified triple net lease portfolio. The announcement details the breakdown of total, ordinary, non-taxable, and Section 199A dividends per common stock share.

feed.title: Umpleby to retire as Caterpillar chairman
feed.summary: Jim Umpleby will retire as Caterpillar’s executive chairman and member of the company’s board of directors on April 1. Joe Creed, who became CEO last May, will succeed Umpleby as chairman of the board. Umpleby, who joined Caterpillar in 1997 and served as CEO for eight years, expressed confidence in Creed's leadership for the company's future.

feed.title: Ventas Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. announced its fourth quarter 2025 earnings release will be issued on Thursday, February 5, 2026, after market close. A conference call to discuss these earnings is scheduled for Friday, February 6, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Details for accessing the call via dial-in or webcast are provided, alongside replay information.

feed.title: Florida power customers see $44 monthly bill cut as storm fee ends early
feed.summary: Duke Energy Florida (NYSE: DUK) announced that the storm cost recovery charge, totaling approximately $1.1 billion from hurricane response costs, will be removed from customer bills a month early. Beginning in February, residential customers will see a $33 reduction per 1,000 kWh, with an additional $11 seasonal decrease in March, bringing the total monthly bill reduction to $44 per 1,000 kWh compared to January. The company also highlighted significant fuel-cost savings from gas-plant improvements, new solar sites, and Inflation Reduction Act tax credits being passed on to customers.

feed.title: Duke Energy Florida announces storm cost recovery charge will be removed from customers' bills a month early
feed.summary: Duke Energy Florida is removing its storm cost recovery charge a month ahead of schedule, starting in February. This change will result in approximately $33 reduction on monthly residential bills for 1,000 kWh users, with an additional $11 decrease in March due to seasonal adjustments. The company cites early recovery of storm-related costs and other savings from efficiency improvements and solar projects as reasons for the rate relief.

feed.title: Is John Deere Making a Truck? The Truth Behind the Rumors
feed.summary: Despite widespread online rumors and AI-generated images, John Deere is not making a pickup truck and has no intentions to enter the consumer truck market. The article clarifies that these viral images and "spec sheets" are fabricated, likely by advanced AI tools, and urges readers to be cautious about such misinformation. John Deere's focus remains on agriculture, with expected 2026 updates concentrating on combines and sprayers.

feed.title: Citigroup Lowers Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) Price Target to $90.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) to $90.00 from $95.00, maintaining a "sell" rating, which implies a potential 9.2% downside. The broader analyst consensus, according to MarketBeat, is a "Hold" with an average target of $120.00. Kimberly-Clark recently exceeded quarterly earnings estimates, reporting $1.82 EPS against an anticipated $1.45, with revenue slightly above expectations.

feed.title: Coinbax Joins the Jack Henry™ Fintech Integration Network
feed.summary: Coinbax, a stablecoin payments platform, has joined the Jack Henry™ Fintech Integration Network (FIN) to integrate its technology with Jack Henry's core banking platforms. This partnership will allow financial institutions using Jack Henry's systems to offer stablecoin payment capabilities with built-in compliance and automated settlement. The integration aims to help banks and credit unions adopt digital asset payment rails while maintaining existing compliance frameworks.

feed.title: Labcorp Holdings Inc. to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.72 (NYSE:LH)
feed.summary: Labcorp Holdings Inc. (NYSE:LH) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.72 per share, payable on March 12th to shareholders of record on February 27th. This dividend represents an annualized yield of 1.1% and is well-covered by the company's earnings, with a low payout ratio of 16.4%. Following the news, Labcorp's stock saw an increase, trading at $261.58.

feed.title: AbbVie Reaches Agreement With Trump Administration, Joining MFN Initiatives
feed.summary: AbbVie has announced a voluntary agreement with the Trump administration to lower drug costs in the US by participating in the TrumpRx program, aligning with Most-Favored Nation (MFN) pricing. This initiative, which includes other major pharmaceutical companies, aims to make medications more affordable for Medicaid and some Medicare beneficiaries through direct-to-consumer purchases on the TrumpRx platform. While promising significant price reductions for various medications, concerns persist about the exclusion of privately insured drugs and potential impacts on pharmacies.

feed.title: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated acquired Dd-Scientific Holdings Limited.
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated has announced the acquisition of Dd-Scientific Holdings Limited and its subsidiary, DD-Scientific Limited, on January 14, 2026. The terms of this transaction were not publicly disclosed. Teledyne Technologies specializes in digital imaging software, test and measurement instruments, aerospace and defense electronics, and engineering systems.

feed.title: Eversource Energy: How a Quiet Grid Giant Is Re?Wiring New England’s Clean Energy Future
feed.summary: Eversource Energy is evolving from a traditional utility into a clean energy infrastructure platform for New England, focusing on grid modernization, offshore wind integration, and diversified services (electric, gas, water). The company's strategy involves building a resilient, data-rich grid capable of handling renewable energy and electric vehicles, coupled with customer programs and a commitment to reliability. This approach positions Eversource Energy as a critical enabler of the region's decarbonization goals, translating into stable growth and dividend support for investors via its regulated asset base.

feed.title: Caterpillar Announces Leadership Transition in Construction Industries
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. announced that Tony Fassino, Group President of Construction Industries, will retire on May 31, 2026, after 30 years with the company. Rod Shurman has been appointed as his successor, effective February 1, 2026. Shurman, currently Senior Vice President of Caterpillar's BCP division, will oversee the company's Construction Industries segment.

feed.title: S&P Global Increases Dividend 1.0% to $0.97
feed.summary: S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) has announced a 1.0% increase in its quarterly cash dividend, raising it from $0.96 to $0.97 per share. This adjustment takes into account the anticipated spin-off of its Mobility division in 2026. The company has a long history of paying dividends since 1937 and has increased its dividend annually for over 50 years.

feed.title: Hear Starbucks Q1 2026 results on its Jan. 28 webcast call live online
feed.summary: Starbucks Corporation (Nasdaq: SBUX) will release its first quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results on January 28, 2026, at 7:45 a.m. Eastern Time. A conference call will follow at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time, which will be webcast live on the company's investor relations website, with a replay available until March 13, 2025.

feed.title: 2025 Public Storage payouts labeled 100% ordinary income for taxes
feed.summary: Public Storage (NYSE: PSA) announced the tax treatment for its 2025 dividends, classifying all distributions for both common and preferred stock as 100% ordinary dividends. These ordinary dividends are not classified as "qualified dividend income" but are considered "qualified REIT dividends" for shareholders other than corporations. This preliminary information is provided to assist with tax filings, with no material changes expected.

feed.title: UBS AG (NYSE: AMUB) plans trigger autocall notes on Freeport-McMoRan
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Freeport-McMoRan Inc. common stock, maturing around January 18, 2028. These notes offer potential quarterly contingent coupons if the stock meets a coupon barrier, with an automatic call feature if the stock reaches its initial level. Investors face the risk of principal loss if the notes are not called and the stock falls below a downside threshold at maturity, and any payments are subject to UBS's creditworthiness.

feed.title: Bank of America Earnings: Looking Through Market Malaise, We See Opportunity
feed.summary: Despite a 5% share drop following its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings report, Morningstar analysts see opportunity in Bank of America (BAC), raising their fair value estimate to $58 from $51 per share. They view the market's negative reaction as short-sighted, highlighting the company's expected 200 basis points of operating leverage and continued net interest income growth. The revised valuation reflects stronger projected fee income growth and improved efficiency ratio targets.

feed.title: Verisk Sues AccuLynx After Bailing on $2 Billion Analytics Deal
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics Inc. has sued AccuLynx.com seeking court approval to terminate its planned $2.35 billion acquisition after an antitrust review by the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) caused significant delays. Verisk claims it had the right to back out because the FTC's prolonged scrutiny pushed the deal past its drop-dead date, undermining the business logic, despite Verisk's "commercially reasonable efforts" to secure clearance.

feed.title: flyExclusive (NYSE: FLYX) extends Jet.AI SpinCo merger deadline to April 30
feed.summary: flyExclusive (NYSE: FLYX) has extended the deadline for its planned merger with Jet.AI SpinCo to April 30, 2026. The amendment, signed on January 13, 2026, pushes back the "Outside Date" for completing the transaction from December 31, 2025. The deal still involves a spin-off of Jet.AI's SpinCo to its stockholders, followed by a merger into a flyExclusive subsidiary, pending conditions like Jet.AI stockholder approval.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble CEO could see major wealth boost from stock incentives
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble's new CEO, Shailesh Jejurikar, has been granted over 130,000 company stock options and a long-term incentive award valued at $14 million, significantly boosting his potential wealth. His compensation package includes a $1.6 million salary and up to $3.2 million in annual incentive pay. This incentive aims to align his financial interests with shareholders as P&G addresses slowing sales and plans to cut 7,000 office jobs.

feed.title: Halper Sadeh LLC Encourages B. Riley Financial, Inc. Shareholders To Contact The Firm To Discuss Their Rights
feed.summary: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating whether certain officers and directors of B. Riley Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: RILY) breached their fiduciary duties to shareholders. The firm encourages long-term shareholders of RILY to contact them to discuss potential corporate governance reforms, recovery of funds, or other benefits. Shareholder participation is highlighted as beneficial for improving company policies and enhancing shareholder value.

feed.title: Form 424B2 GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
feed.summary: GS Finance Corp. is offering $8,211,000 in Callable S&P 500® Index-Linked Notes due 2028, guaranteed by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. These notes do not bear interest and mature on January 18, 2028, unless redeemed earlier by GS Finance Corp. Investors could lose their entire investment if the S&P 500® Index performs poorly, and the notes are subject to the credit risk of both GS Finance Corp. and The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc.

feed.title: Verizon Outage Hits Customers, Phones Showing 'SOS': VZ Stock Trades Higher
feed.summary: Verizon customers are experiencing widespread outages affecting cellular data and voice services, with many phones displaying "SOS" alerts, particularly in major cities. Despite the service interruptions, Verizon Communications' stock (NYSE: VZ) traded higher today. The company acknowledges the issue and is working to resolve it, while competitors T-Mobile and AT&T report their networks are operating normally.

feed.title: Exceed World, Inc. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Exceed World, Inc. has released its annual Form 10-K report, detailing financial performance, business operations, and strategic initiatives, focusing on e-learning and multilevel marketing in Japan. The company reported a significant decrease in revenue and a net loss due to reduced recruitment activities for its 'Force Club' premium members. Moving forward, Exceed World plans to expand its sales network, enhance benefits for premium members, and leverage investments in new ventures like the Connector Plan gaming platform to address financial and operational challenges.

feed.title: Buffett Refused A Raise For Decades, His Successor Is Making 250x More To Lead Berkshire Hathaway
feed.summary: Greg Abel has become the new CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, taking over from Warren Buffett. Abel's base salary is $25 million, which is 250 times more than Buffett's $100,000 annual salary. Buffett famously refused raises for decades, maintaining a frugal lifestyle and demonstrating dedication to the company and shareholders.

feed.title: AlphaTON Capital raises $15 million in registered direct offering
feed.summary: AlphaTON Capital Corp (NASDAQ:ATON) has announced a registered direct offering to sell 15 million ordinary shares at $1.00 each, aiming to raise $15 million in gross proceeds. The funds will be used to scale its Cocoon AI initiative, for working capital, and general corporate purposes. This comes amidst recent acquisitions of NVIDIA chips for its AI infrastructure and denials of strategic investments from other companies.

feed.title: The Bitwise Ethereum ETF (ETHW) Set To Launch on the NYSE
feed.summary: Bitwise Asset Management announced the launch of its Ethereum ETF (ETHW) on the NYSE, scheduled for July 23, with a management fee of 0.20% and a promise to donate 10% of fund profits to Ethereum developers. This fund will invest directly in ether (ETH) and aims to offer investors diversified crypto exposure to the Ethereum blockchain's influential use cases like DeFi and NFTs. Bitwise will also publish the ETHW holdings' Ethereum addresses for transparency, marking a significant step in making crypto investments more accessible to a broader range of investors.

feed.title: MasterCraft Launches All-New X22 Model
feed.summary: MasterCraft has introduced the all-new X22, a completely redesigned premium 22-foot towboat that aims to set a new standard in its class. Building on the brand's luxury X Series DNA and drawing inspiration from the X24, the X22 offers enhanced agility, sharper handling, and a refined experience with advanced features like the SurfStar system and a powerful Ilmor engine. The boat features a sophisticated design, luxurious interior, and high-tech helm, integrating usability with performance for an elevated on-water experience.

feed.title: Form 424B2 GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
feed.summary: This SEC Form 424B2 filing by Goldman Sachs Group Inc. details the pricing supplement for Equity Index Linked Securities due January 12, 2029. These auto-callable securities with contingent coupon and contingent downside principal at risk are linked to the lowest performing of the S&P 500®, Russell 2000®, and EURO STOXX 50® Indexes. The document outlines the terms, potential risks, hypothetical returns, and tax considerations for investors, emphasizing that returns depend on the performance of the lowest performing index.

feed.title: Otis Expands Little Engineers STEM Program Globally
feed.summary: Otis is expanding its successful "Little Engineers" STEM education program globally after its initial launch in Hong Kong SAR. This hands-on initiative teaches young students about elevator and escalator technology, safety, and history, aiming to inspire interest in STEM fields. Otis volunteers lead interactive lessons and projects, reinforcing the company's commitment to community engagement and innovation.

feed.title: Scotiabank Lowers Price Target for Regency Centers (REG) to $76
feed.summary: Scotiabank has maintained its "Sector Perform" rating for Regency Centers (REG) but lowered its price target from $78.00 to $76.00, reflecting a minor adjustment by analyst Nicholas Yulico. This follows several recent downgrades by other firms like Mizuho, UBS, and JP Morgan. Despite these adjustments, the average one-year price target from 19 analysts still implies an upside of 13.60% from the current price for Regency Centers, a major retail REIT primarily focused on grocery-anchored shopping centers.

feed.title: Nordson Corporation stock hits 52-week high at 266.97 USD
feed.summary: Nordson Corporation's stock has reached a 52-week high of $266.97, reflecting a 26.06% increase over the past year and signifying strong investor confidence and company performance. This milestone follows a robust fourth-quarter earnings report for 2025 where adjusted EPS surpassed forecasts, despite revenue slightly missing expectations. Analyst firms like DA Davidson and KeyBanc have maintained positive ratings and raised price targets for Nordson, citing strong free cash flow and margin execution.
